arts.ttl: George Baldock: Sheffield United and Leeds pay emotional tribute to defender after death aged 31
arts.sum: Championship rivals join together to remember the former Blades full-back, who died in Athens last week

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke press conference LIVE as Leeds United boss reacts to stellar home win over Sheff Utd
arts.sum: Follow everything the manager has to say about Friday night's match below as we bring you most of the questions and answers in full from the debrief. Before the match, Farke made no changes to the side that drew with Sunderland two weeks ago.

arts.ttl: Leeds United 2-0 Sheffield United: Blades completely outclassed in Yorkshire derby
arts.sum: Sheffield United were comfortably the second-best team at Elland Road on Friday night as Leeds United claimed three points with a 2-0 win, and the Blades tasted defeat for the first time. The home side broke the deadlock in the 69th minute when Pascal Struijk expertly met a scuffed Joe Rothwell corner, but there was […] The post Leeds United 2-0 Sheffield United: Blades completely outclassed in Yorkshire derby appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder pulls no punches after Sheffield United's loss at Leeds United
arts.sum: Chris Wilder paid a huge compliment to Leeds United after seeing his Sheffield United lose 2-0 at Elland Road tonight, labelling the Whites as the "best side they have faced" this season. arts.ttl: Daniel Farke addresses Leeds United 'curse' after 'complicated' Sheffield United victory
arts.sum: Farke told Sky Sports that he is a "big believer" in set pieces and and felt a goal from a dead ball situation was "coming". On their performance, Farke said: "It was a complicated game and we had to be switched on.

arts.ttl: Leeds end Sheffield United’s unbeaten start with victory at Elland Road
arts.sum: Daniel Farke’s side leap-frogged the visitors into second place in the Sky Bet Championship table.

arts.ttl: Leeds end Sheff Utd's unbeaten start to move second
arts.sum: Leeds ended Sheffield United's unbeaten start to the season and moved second in the Championship table after a 2-0 win at Elland Road on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Leeds United 2-0 Sheffield United highlights as Joseph and Struijk blunt the Blades
arts.sum: O'Hare breaks from it, beats off Aaronson, but Ramazani comes steaming in to win the ball and send the playmaker flying. Goes left to Firpo, cuts inside, calls for him to shoot, but he wins the corner.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings with Rothwell and Struijk immense in huge win
arts.sum: Mateo Joseph put the cherry on the cake at the death with a great second goal for the Whites in a stellar victory over the previously unbeaten visitors. It proved to be a night of joy for Leeds United, as their dominance eventually told in the second half with a rare goal from a corner.

arts.ttl: Leeds United and Sheffield United pay emotional tribute to George Baldock at Elland Road
arts.sum: Baldock, who was with Greek side Panathinaikos when he passed away, played more than 200 games for Sheffield United during his seven years at Bramall Lane, winning two promotions to the Premier League. Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder reflected on the poignant situation before the game, saying: "It's been really difficult.
